business.brandTagline: Experience the heart of authentic Vietnamese cuisine in Campbell, CA. We serve traditional flavors crafted with modern passion.
business.hoursNote: To-go orders and last calls end 15 minutes before closing.

welcome.bodyText: We're a family-run Vietnamese spot in Campbell. We cook the way we grew up eating. Broth takes twelve hours. Herbs come in fresh every morning. No shortcuts, no tricks, just real phở. Come try!

banner.text: Fresh & Authentic Vietnamese Food in the Heart of Campbell

delivery.heading: Delivered to your door.
delivery.subheading: Pick your platform — same kitchen, same broth, same care.
delivery.ratingNote: average rating across all delivery platforms

events.heading: Book the Entire Restaurant
events.subheading: Birthdays, anniversaries, corporate dinners, family reunions — host your night in our space, with our full menu and full attention.
details: Reserve the entire restaurant by the hour
Custom menu and party tray options

photos.alt: VPho interior — red booths along the mural wall
VPho storefront at night with neon sign

items.title: House Combination Pho
items.description: Phở Đặc Biệt. Filet mignon, beef meatball, brisket, tendon, and tripe with thin rice noodles in a rich beef broth, slow-simmered overnight.
items.alt: Traditional Vietnamese pho with fresh herbs

items.title: Signature Rib Bone Pho
items.description: Back rib that's been on the stove for hours, with filet mignon and rice noodles. Meat falls off the bone!

items.title: Party Trays
items.description: Big pans for bigger crowds. Fried rice, spring rolls, pho by the gallon. You bring the party, we pack the food.

hero.description: We grew up eating this food. Now we cook it for you. Broth simmers overnight, herbs come in fresh every morning. Come hungry.
